$schema_purpose: Master generation prompt for the TestPrep 'SAT Customized Roadmap'. Feed this ENTIRE object to the designer/model for every student. Edit ONLY the 'student_inputs' block per case; never edit 'design_system', 'page_structure', 'component_library', 'asset_manifest', or 'editorial_rules' — those are frozen so every output is visually identical.
role: You are a senior editorial designer producing a premium A4 PDF study plan for TestPrep (a House of Prep brand). Reproduce the locked design system EXACTLY. The only variation between documents is the student data in 'student_inputs'. Do not redesign, restyle, re-order, or 'improve' anything outside that block.

output_format.medium: Single Design Component HTML file (.dc.html), inline styles only.
output_format.fixed_running_header: @top-left 'TESTPREP · HOUSE OF PREP', @top-right 'page / total', 7pt Inter, letter-spacing 0.1em, color #aab2c0
output_format.per_page_footer: Inset rounded navy pill (radius 9px, left/right 8mm, bottom 5mm, height 9mm): TestPrep wordmark + 1px divider + 'HOUSE OF PREP'. Suppressed on the final page (closing card extends over it).

typography.family: Inter (Google Fonts), weights 400/500/600/700/800. NO other typeface anywhere, including SVG chart text.

scale.mono_data_label: 8.5-9.5px / 500-600, letter-spacing 0.12-0.18em (rendered in Inter, NOT a mono font)

color_usage_rules: Navy #0c1730 is the authority color: masthead band, insight panels, Performance Engine page, closing page, Elmy strip, footer pill.
Primary blue #1740a9 for section accents, data fills, section numbers.
Orange #ff963e used SPARINGLY: the gap/target, step 07, the single highlighted milestone, kickers. Never as a large fill on light pages.
Green #1f8a5b only for the 'what is working' strengths label.
Light pages stay clean and white; dark pages are deliberate narrative moments only.
design_system.rule_no_sharp_corners: Every surface, card, tile, bar, chip and image uses the radius scale above. No square corners anywhere.
design_system.top_accent_bar: Dark sections carry a 4px top bar split ~44/56: orange (#ff963e) on the left segment, blue (#1740a9) on the right, corners rounded to match the band.
design_system.gridding: Single centered column, max content width ~760px / inner padding 30px. Dark full-bleed sections use margin 6px 16px 0 and their own internal padding.

elements: Rounded hero image (asset: cover-hero.png) at radius 18px with soft shadow, aspect ~1:1.
Eyebrow: '{{season_year}}' in primary blue serif-weight Inter 21px.
Subtitle: 'A diagnostic-built academic strategy, prepared for {{student_name}} · {{diagnostic_label}} · {{diagnostic_date}}.'
Brand stat band (navy, radius 16px, 4 columns): {{brand_stats}} (e.g. 20K+ Students / 40+ Partners / 12+ Years / 5+ Countries).

masthead: Navy band, top accent bar, kicker 'PERSONALIZED SAT ROADMAP'.
Orange pill badge: '+{{gap}}  POINTS TO GAIN' above a rounded progress bar (navy fill to baseline%, orange hatch from baseline% to target%).
Stat row (4 cols, divided): FOCUSED INSTRUCTION {{instruction_hours}} · LEARNING ACCOMMODATION {{accommodation}} · MAX SESSION LENGTH {{max_session_length}} · SESSION FORMAT {{session_format}}.
section_01_diagnosis: Section head: ghost '01' + kicker 'THE DIAGNOSIS' + h2 'What your diagnostic actually says'.
Two section gauges (R&W and Math): {{section_scores}} with % big numeral, progress bar, and 'score / 800 · X of Y correct'.
Two-column panel: 'WHAT'S WORKING' (green, list of {{strengths}}) and 'WHAT'S HOLDING YOU BACK' (orange, list of {{blockers}}). List items use a bold label + colon, never a dash.
Navy insight panel, kicker 'THE PATTERN, IN ONE LINE': '{{pattern_statement}}'.

page_3_the_climb: Section head: ghost '02' + 'THE CLIMB' + h2 'How instruction closes the gap'.

Elevation curve figure (radius 14px, surface tint): SVG line from {{baseline}} through {{milestones}} to {{target}}, dotted nodes, final node orange. Stage labels START/EARLY/CORE/PRECISION/TARGET. Caption explains the steep-start / flattening-top logic.
Two tracks (2 cards): TRACK 1 · INSTRUCTION ('{{instruction_hours}}, guided') and TRACK 2 · YOUR EFFORT ('Student commitment').
page_4_plan_of_attack: Section head: ghost '03' + 'THE PLAN OF ATTACK' + h2 'Where your {{instruction_hours_int}} hours go'.
Weighted lanes (3 stacked bars sized to proportion): {{hour_allocation}} (e.g. Math 18 / Reading & Writing 15 / Strategy 3). Widest = navy, mid = blue, smallest = orange.
'The order of attack': 3 sequenced rows (01 FIRST / 02 THEN / 03 FINALLY) each with hours + colored skill chips from {{order_of_attack}}.
page_5_performance_engine: Dark page. Kicker 'HOW IT WORKS' + h2 'The TestPrep Performance Engine' (second word in accent blue) + 'A seven-step process, the same loop that produced this roadmap.'

FROZEN 7-step grid (2 cols; step 07 full-width highlighted orange): 01 Diagnostic Assessment, 02 Performance Gap Analysis, 03 Personalized Learning Plan, 04 Targeted Instruction, 05 Micro-Assessments, 06 Adaptive Optimization, 07 Full-Length Simulation & Iteration. Each: rounded icon tile + ghost numeral + title + one-line description. THIS CONTENT IS FIXED for every student.
Closing note tying the loop to the student (uses {{student_name}}, {{target}}).
page_6_tracking: Section head: ghost '04' + 'TRACKING & ACCOUNTABILITY' + h2 'When you'll see your progress'.
Three monitoring loops (3 cards), each headed by a solid rounded letter badge: A = SKILLS LOOP (blue), B = PROGRESS LOOP (mid-blue), C = MILESTONES (orange). Cadence from {{tracking_loops}}.
Elmy platform strip (navy, radius 14px): asset logo-elmy-white.svg + 'Elmy' + 'The platform that powers all three loops.'
'A shared commitment' block + 3 signature lines (Student signature / Date / Target test window).
page_7_closing: Dark page. Kicker 'DELIVERED BY TESTPREP' + centered TestPrep logo + h2 'One team, accountable for your result' + delivery paragraph (uses {{baseline}}, {{target}}).
Statement line: 'Precision in the diagnosis. Intelligence in the plan. Visibility at every step. That is the TestPrep difference.'
Marketing strip 'DISCOVER THE FAMILY' / 'The same thinking, everywhere you grow' + 3 sister-brand cards (weguide. / prep me. / Elmy). Framed as marketing only, NOT co-deliverers.
Instagram QR CTA card (asset: qr-instagram.png on a white rounded tile): 'SCAN TO FOLLOW' / 'See the community behind the roadmap' / handle {{instagram_handle}}.
Footer row: TestPrep logo + 'Prepared for {{student_name}} · {{diagnostic_date}} · © House of Prep'.

component_library.section_head: ghost numeral (42px #d6deec) + 2.5px top border in primary blue + mono-style kicker (orange #c7560a) + serif-weight Inter h2.
component_library.stat_chip: tiny uppercase label (#8fa2cb) above a 22px value; on navy use white/accent-blue values; 1px left divider between chips.
component_library.gauge_card: bordered radius-12 card: title + big % numeral (primary blue) + thin progress bar (radius 4) + mono caption.
component_library.insight_panel: navy radius-14 card with a 4px orange left edge, orange kicker, white serif-weight statement.
component_library.weighted_lane: rounded-10 horizontal bar, width = proportion of total hours, big white hours numeral + label inside.
component_library.skill_chip: radius-8 pill: orange-tint (#fbe6d4/#9a4708) for FIRST, blue-tint (#dfe7f6/#1740a9) for THEN, grey (#eef0f4/#4a5566) for FINALLY.
component_library.loop_badge: 26px solid rounded-8 letter tile (A blue / B mid-blue / C orange) + colored uppercase label.
component_library.qr_cta: dark feature card with a white rounded-14 tile holding the QR PNG, orange kicker, white headline, muted body.

asset_manifest.note: These shared files live in /assets and MUST be reused verbatim in every document so the look is identical. Do not regenerate or restyle them.
asset_manifest.cover-hero.png: Page 1 cover photograph (TestPrep dashboard scene). Reused for all students unless a student-specific approved image is supplied.
asset_manifest.logo-testprep-white.png: TestPrep wordmark (white) — masthead context, footers, closing, family strip.
asset_manifest.logo-elmy-white.svg: Elmy mark — tracking strip + family card.
asset_manifest.qr-instagram.png: Instagram QR for @testprep.lb — closing CTA. Replace only if the account changes.

editorial_rules.source_of_truth: The student's diagnostic report is the only factual source. Never invent scores, names, dates, services, or partnerships.
editorial_rules.preserve: All verified data, names, dates, figures, service descriptions, and required caveats.
editorial_rules.allowed: Condensing repetition, sharpening headings, converting data into the locked visual modules, fixing minor grammar.
editorial_rules.tone: Authoritative, data-driven, strategic, human, premium but accessible. Speak to the student and parent.
editorial_rules.punctuation: NO em-dashes or dash-as-pause ('—' / ' - '). Use full sentences, colons for label lists, and structured transitions. Hyphens are allowed ONLY inside genuine compound words (rule-based, grid-ins, high-impact).
editorial_rules.no_overpromise: Frame the target as earned and credible, never guaranteed.
editorial_rules.evidence_bridge: Tie every number (hour weighting, milestones, priorities) back to a real pattern in the student's diagnostic so the plan reads as derived, not arbitrary.

student_inputs.$comment: ==== THE ONLY BLOCK YOU EDIT PER STUDENT. Everything above stays frozen. ====

strengths.label: Math mechanics
strengths.detail: algebra and geometry basics are intact

strengths.label: Engagement
strengths.detail: you used 97.6% of the time, so effort isn't the issue

blockers.label: Reasoning
blockers.detail: inference (0/6) and command of evidence form the biggest R&W pool

blockers.label: Advanced Math
blockers.detail: exponentials, factoring, and nonlinear form the deepest gap

student_inputs.pattern_statement: You apply rules well, but reasoning is the gap. The more a question rewards interpretation, the more it costs you. That's exactly what stands between 840 and 1300, and it's teachable.

tracking_loops.name: PROGRESS LOOP
tracking_loops.title: Full practice section
tracking_loops.detail: Cumulative gain and timing, with a progress note.
